title.en: PHYSICAL THERAPY APPARATUS, e.g. DEVICES FOR LOCATING OR STIMULATING REFLEX POINTS IN THE BODY; ARTIFICIAL RESPIRATION; MASSAGE; BATHING DEVICES FOR SPECIAL THERAPEUTIC OR HYGIENIC PURPOSES OR SPECIFIC PARTS OF THE BODY (electrotherapy, magnetotherapy, radiation therapy or ultrasound therapy A61N)
Apparatus for passive exercising (A61H5/00 takes precedence); Vibrating apparatus; Chiropractic devices, e.g. body impacting devices, external devices for briefly extending or aligning unbroken bones
{Apparatus for applying movements to the whole body}
{Moveable platforms, e.g. vibrating or oscillating platforms for standing, sitting, laying or leaning}
{Apparatus for applying pressure or blows for compressive stressing of a part of the skeletal structure, e.g. for preventing or alleviating osteoporosis}
{Apparatus for applying pressure or blows almost perpendicular to the body or limb axis, e.g. chiropractic devices for repositioning vertebrae, correcting deformation}
Stretching or bending {or torsioning} apparatus for exercising

Appliances for aiding patients or disabled persons to walk about (apparatus for helping babies to walk A47D13/04 {; applying electrical currents by contact electrodes for stimulating motor muscles, e.g. walking assistance A61N1/36003})
{on steps or stairways}
{with attached or incorporated article carrying means}
{with knee, leg or stump rests}
{with forearm rests, i.e. for non-used arms}
{secured to the patient, e.g. with belts}
{using suspension devices for supporting the body in an upright walking or standing position, e.g. harnesses}
Crutches
Wheeled walking aids for patients or disabled persons
Walking aids for blind persons (replacing direct visual perception by another kind of perception A61F9/08)
Exercisers for the eyes
{Exercisers for training the stereoscopic view}
Devices for suction-kneading massage; Devices for massaging the skin by rubbing or brushing not otherwise provided for (electro-medical massage devices applying electric current by contact A61N1/18)
{without substantial movement between the skin and the device}
{by rubbing or brushing}
{Helmets for head-massage (baths for the head A61H35/008; washing, rinsing, drying A45D)}
{Kneading}
Pneumatic or hydraulic massage
{Pulsating}
{with particles, e.g. sand}
{Hydraulic massage}
{Pneumatic massage}
Belts, strips or combs for massage purposes
{with belt or strap expanding and contracting around an encircled body part}
Massage devices with strips oscillating lengthwise
Gum massage
{Hydraulic gum massage}
Massage by means of rollers, balls, e.g. inflatable, chains, or roller chains
{with balls or rollers rotating about their own axis}
{with freely rotating spheres}
{with balls or rollers having built-in vibrating means}
{power-driven}
{hand-held (A61H15/0085 takes precedence)}
adapted for simultaneous treatment with light, heat or drugs
Massage for the genitals; {Devices for improving sexual intercourse (penis erection devices A61F5/41; vibration or percussion related aspects A61H23/00)}
{Devices for external stimulation of the genitals}
{Devices insertable in the genitals}
{Devices for use during sexual intercourse}
Massage devices for cavities of the body {, e.g. nose, ears and anus (for the genitals A61H19/00); Vibration or percussion related aspects A61H23/00}

Percussion or vibration massage, e.g. using supersonic vibration; Suction-vibration massage; Massage with moving diaphragms {(apparatus for passive exercising A61H1/00; generating or transmitting mechanical vibrations in general B06B)}
{having a percussion element combined with a passive spacer element for bearing against the skin}
{With mechanical drive, e.g. spring mechanism or vibrating unit being hit for starting vibration and then applied to the body of a patient}
{Percussion or tapping massage (hand percussion A61H23/06)}
{using shock waves}
with electric or magnetic drive
with hydraulic or pneumatic drive {(hydraulic or Pneumatic massages, A61H9/00; underwater massages, A61H33/00)}
Hand percussion {, i.e. Hand driven (chiropractic devices, A61H1/008, A61H1/006)}

Artificial respiration by a force applied to the chest; Heart stimulation, e.g. heart massage (applying electric currents by contact electrodes for stimulation, e.g. heart pace-makers, A61N1/36 {; teaching or training models, demonstration models for medical purposes G09B23/288})
{fixed on the chest by suction}
{fixed on the chest by adhesives}
{with alternated thorax decompression due to lateral compression}
{Heart stimulation}
{Supine patient supports or bases, e.g. improving air-way access to the lungs}
Iron lungs

Bathing devices for special therapeutic or hygienic purposes (A61H35/00 takes precedence; {sprays acting on a body or body part not immersed in water A61H9/00; means for washing bed-ridden persons A61G7/0005;} for sub aquatic intestinal cleaning A61M9/00; {isolation chambers A61M21/0094; } electric or magnetic baths, applying ionised fluids A61N1/44 {; heater for bath tubs F24H1/54})
{Bathing devices specially adapted for treating burned patients}
{Arrangement for cleaning the installation before or after use}
{Arrangement for cleaning the fluid during use}
{Cleaning and recovery of the fluid without mixing the cleaned and uncleaned fluid, e.g. using a recovery tank}
{with heat-recovery of waste fluid}
{Electrical circuits therefor}
{Therapeutic baths with agitated or circulated water}
{Arrangements for varying the temperature of the liquid}
Bathing devices for use with gas-containing liquid, or liquid in which gas is led or generated, e.g. carbon dioxide baths {(A61H33/6026 takes precedence)}
Appliances for sand, mud {, wax} or foam baths; Appliances for metal baths, e.g. using metal salt solutions
Artificial hot-air or cold-air baths; Steam or gas baths or douches, e.g. sauna or Finnish baths {(artificial climate rooms A61G10/02)}
Devices for gas baths with ozone, hydrogen, or the like (production of ozone or hydrogen C01B, C25B1/02)
{Components specifically designed for the therapeutic baths of groups A61H33/00 (plumbing E03C1/00)}
Baths for specific parts of the body {(electric circuits therefor A61H33/005; specific components therefor A61H33/60)}

for the eyes
for the nose

Accessories for massage
{Body floating supports for relaxation in water}
Devices for locating or stimulating specific reflex points of the body for physical therapy, e.g. acupuncture (chiropodists' instruments A61B17/54; {for radiation therapy A61N5/0619})
{Using electric currents (electrotherapy A61N1/32)}
{by means of electromagnetic waves, e.g. I.R., U.V. rays}
{Stimulation by mechanical vibrations, e.g. ultrasonic}
Devices for locating such points
Devices for pressing such points, e.g. Shiatsu {or Acupressure}(Massage or pressure on general areas A61H9/00 - A61H23/00)

Devices for heating or cooling such points within cell-life limits (cauterisers, moxaburners, cryogenic apparatus A61B18/06; heating or cooling appliances for medical treatment of general areas of the human body A61F7/00)
Devices for applying needles to such points, i.e. for acupuncture {; Acupuncture needles or accessories therefor}
